title: Math Procedure Example
subtitle: Worked method or algorithm with common mistakes.

sections.heading: Math Procedure in use
sections.body: This procedure walks through solving a quadratic equation by factoring, including decision points and common mistakes.

cards.title: Pattern
cards.body: Find two numbers that multiply to 6 and add to -5.

steps.title: Identify coefficients
steps.body: For x^2 - 5x + 6, the product target is 6 and the sum target is -5.

steps.title: Find factor pair
steps.body: -2 and -3 multiply to 6 and add to -5.

steps.title: Use zero product rule
steps.body: Set each factor to zero, so x = 2 or x = 3.

rows: Signs must make the middle term -5x
A quadratic can have two solutions
